name: Aripicker.github.io
body:
# Ari Picker's Personal Page

Here are a few projects to check out -

### An [app](http://pickra.github.io/Political-Troll/) that easily looks up US Senator's and Congressman's voting record based on their state. It shows when they voted, what they voted on and how they voted.
- corresponding github [repo](https://github.com/Pickra/Political-Troll).

### A [to-do](http://pickra.github.io/to-do/) app using [Parse](https://www.parse.com/) as backend.
- corresponding github [repo](https://github.com/Pickra/to-do).

### A tiny responsive [piece](http://pickra.github.io/irnyrd-proj/) I made for [The Iron Yard](http://theironyard.com/).
- corresponding github [repo](https://github.com/Pickra/irnyrd-proj)
- [Where](http://theironyard.com/education/academy/front-end-engineering/graduates/) they implemented it on the Iron Yard site.

### A fun little plugin, that [smacks](http://pickra.github.io/make-plugin/demo/#) the user, to be used for validation.
- corresponding github [repo](https://github.com/Pickra/make-plugin).

### an [assignment](http://pickra.github.io/mobber/)  I was given while at [The Iron Yard](http://theironyard.com/), to replicate a page based off of a .png; and nothing else.
- corresponding github [repo](https://github.com/Pickra/mobber).

## Thanks for checking out my work. More to come.
note: Don't delete this file! It's used internally to help with page regeneration.
